instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that paginates `allItems` using numeric `page` and `pageSize`, rendering only the current slice via list slicing. Show current page, page count, and formatted item count. Escape item names.
code:
<#-- Model: allItems: sequence of { name }, page: number, pageSize: number --> <#assign currentPage = (page!1)?number> <#assign size = (pageSize!10)?number> <#assign total = allItems?size> <#assign pageCount = ((total + size - 1) / size)?int> <#assign offset = (currentPage - 1) * size>
    <#list allItems[offset..*size] as item>
  • ${item.name?html}
    • <#else>
  • No items on this page.

Page ${currentPage} of ${pageCount?c} (${total?c} items)
